meaning: n.春天,跃起,泉,弹簧,发条,弹性,弹力,根源v.跳,跃,跃出,使跳跃,使爆炸,触发
examples: Trade usually picks up in the spring.
She's played solidly throughout the spring.
The spring brought rising subprime delinquency rates and the ensuing failures of subprime lenders.
One suit is set to go to trial in a Philadelphia federal courthouse this spring.
